TECHNICAL_ISSUES: Technical problems with application, website errors, or login issues
DEADLINES_TIMELINES: Dates, deadlines, and timeline of the admission campaign
DOCUMENT_SUBMISSION: Required documents, how to submit files, and fixing application errors
STATUS_VERIFICATION: Application tracking, appearance in contest lists, and confirmation
SCORES_COMPETITION: Passing scores, competition level, and chances of admission
PAYMENTS_CONTRACTS: Tuition fees, payment methods, and education contracts
ENROLLMENT: Final enrollment steps, consent forms, and admission orders
DORMITORY_HOUSING: Dormitory housing, check-in rules, and accommodation costs
STUDIES_SCHEDULE: Class schedules, student IDs, and start of the semester
EVENTS: Open house days, excursions, and applicant meetings
GENERAL_INFO: General university contacts, address, and military department
PROGRAM_CONSULTATION: Advice on choosing a major or comparing study programs
